question: Will the S&P 500 be between 6775 and 6799.9999 on Apr 9, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 closed yesterday (April 8) at 6,782.81, which is already within the target range of 6775-6799.9999. Given the market's recent stability around this level and typical daily volatility, there's a very high probability it will remain in this narrow 25-point range today. The 15% market price severely undervalues this probability.
